verses.text: Ka ta aw, nang na hih leh Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawl manin i ngah hehpihna hangin thahatin om in
Mi tampite' theihin ka thuhilh, na zaksa thu khempeuh, midangte a hilhsawn thei dingin a citak mite tungah hoihtakin a zuih dingun na hilh in
Khrih Jesuh' galkap hoih hihna tawh thuakdingin a kisam khempeuh na na thuak in
Galkap a semlai mipa in ama tungah a om bupa a lungkimsak theihna dingin na sem ahih manin tualsung mite' nasep tawh thuahkhawm lo hi
Kimawl kidemna-ah a kihel mi khatpeuh in kimawlna ngeina zui lopi-in gualzawh pahtawina ngah theilo hi
Hahkat takin lo a khopa in anlak hun ciangin a tampen a ngah dingin a kilawm ahi hi
Topa in thu khempeuh na theihna dingin hong huhding ahih manin hih ka thugente khempeuh limtakin na ngaihsun in
Lungdamna Thu ka hilhna sungah ka gen mah bangin David' suan, sihna panin a kithosak Jesuh Khrih na na phawk in
Ama hangin a kingah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh manin gimna ka thuak a, mithat bangin sikkol hong kibulh hi. Pasian' thu ahih leh sikkol kibulh theilo hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian' teel mite in zong Khrih Jesuh hangin hotkhiatna leh tawntung minthan'na a ngahkhawm theihna dingun amaute' hangin na khempeuh ka thuak hi
Tua ahih manin, “Amah tawh i sihkhawm leh amah tawh i nungta khawm ding hi
Eite in gimna i thuak paisuakzawh leh amah tawh i ukkhawm ding hi. Amah i nial leh amah in zong eite hong nial ding hi
Amah leh amah kikhem theilo ahih manin eite i citak kei zongin amah citak veve ding hi,” ci-in a kigenna thu man mahmah hi.
Na mite thu kinialin a kitotlohna dingun Pasian' mai-ah thupi takin na hilhkhol in. Tua bang thu kinialna in a za mite phattuamna ngahsak loin a siasak bek ahi hi
Pasian' thuman a mantakin hilhin, na nasepna-ah maizumna thuakloin, Pasian' pahtakna na ngahtheihna dingin na siam tawpin hanciam in
Pasian tawh mite a kigamlasak semsem thei thu ginalo, a haihuai thu kikup thu kiselnate na pelh in
Tua bangin amau' thugennate in mite siasak a, tua banga thugente lakah Hymenaias leh Filetas a kihel uh hi
Thuman lampi panin amaute pialkhin uh a, thawhkikna thu pen a beisa thu hi ta hi, ci-in thu um mi pawlkhat lungmangsak uh hi

Ahi zongin Pasian in a phuhsa sutpi kilokzo ngeilo ding hi. Tua sutpi tungah, “Topa in ama mi kua teng hiam cih thei hi,” cihna leh, “Topa tawh kipawl ing, a ci peuhmah in mawhna sukhalo ding hi,” cihna kigelh hi

Inn lian khat peuhpeuh sungah umlebeel a nam tuamtuam a om hi. Pawlkhatte ngun tawh kibawl a, pawlkhatte kham tawh kibawl a, pawlkhatte sing tawh, pawlkhatte tungman tawh kibawl hi. Pawlkhatte a thupi diakin zattheih ding, pawlkhatte nisimin a mawkmawkin zattheih ding ahi hi

Mi khatpeuh a hoihlo na khempeuh panin kikemin a siangtho takin a om nak leh na hoih nam khempeuh a sem dingin a Topa tungah ki-apin, a Topa tungah a manpha suak ahih manin a thupi diakte-ah amah kizang ding hi
Tua ahih manin khangno lunggulhna hoihlote pelh in la, lungsim takpi tawh Topa tungah huhna a ngen mite tawh thuman thutak, upna, itna, kilemna na neihtheihna dingun hanciam khawm un
Thu kihai selna, theilopi-a thu kinialnate na pelh in. Tua bangte in kitotna a pian'sak lamtak na theihsa ahi hi
Topa' na a sem mite, kitot a hatte hilo ding a, mi khempeuh tungah lungsim nemin, thugen siamin, thuakzawhna nei-in
thunem tawh a langte' hoihlohna a puahtheite hi ding hi. Tua bang hi leh Pasian in amaute kisiksak thei ding a, thuman thutak hong thei-in
Dawimangpa in ama deihna bangin a gamta dingin a mat khit hangin ama thang panin amaute suakta khathei ding uh hi.
